ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "company_registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number for the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "company_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "company_status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "offense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the offense (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the legal statute or regulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offense type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offense type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., federal, state) */,
  "agency_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "agency_website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "agency_jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the agency (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the agency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the agency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the penalty was imposed on */,
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense type */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that imposed the penalty */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  "penalty_year" INTEGER /* Year the penalty was imposed */,
  "penalty_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the penalty (e.g., unpaid, partially paid, paid in full) */,
  "penalty_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the penalty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the penalty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the penalty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_offense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_type_id") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that committed the offense */,
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense type */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date the offense was committed */,
  "offense_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the offense */,
  "offense_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the offense */,
  "offense_location" TEXT /* Location where the offense occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offense record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offense record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenses_offense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_type_id") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_offense_history" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date the offense was committed */,
  "offense_status" TEXT /* Status of the offense (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalty_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalty_payments_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_penalties" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty */,
  "penalty_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was imposed */,
  "penalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the penalty (e.g., unpaid, partially paid, paid in full) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_offenses" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date the offense was committed */,
  "offense_status" TEXT /* Status of the offense (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id", "offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_penalties" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty */,
  "penalty_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was imposed */,
  "penalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the penalty (e.g., unpaid, partially paid, paid in full) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id", "penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investigator, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "upload_file" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
